nixos.description: NixOS + Home Manager + Nix function lookup. Use FIRST for any option path, package name, or Nix builtin — stops hallucinated option names.

github.description: Search nixpkgs/HM/PM issues, browse module source. Token: set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in ~/.claude/settings.json env or .claude/settings.local.json env.

fetch.description: Fetch NixOS Discourse, Wiki, and upstream docs for debugging. Use when community troubleshooting is needed.
